items.title: language-model-builder
items.summary: An educational macOS app: build and chat with a tiny language model, trained on your Mac
items.summary_cn: 教育版macOS应用程序：构建微型语言模型并与之聊天，在Mac上进行培训
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: Sonar-Scanner
items.summary: High-performance AI-enhanced sonar scanner on ESP32-S3 with EKF filtering, ML object classification, and real-time occupancy grid visualization.
items.summary_cn: ESP32-S3上的高性能AI增强声纳扫描仪，具有EKF滤波、ML对象分类和实时占用网格可视化。
items.comment: 跑分赢了，实际用起来怎么样？用户体感比数字更重要。

items.title: 3D-Aware VLMs with Implicit and Explicit Geometries
items.title_cn: 具有隐式和显式几何形状的3D感知VLM
items.summary: Despite rapid progress, most existing vision-language models (VLMs) built from 2D visual inputs often struggle when handling various 3D tasks that require fine-grained spatial understanding and reasoning. To bridge this gap, we present VLM-IE3D, a unified framework that enhances the 3D spatial aware...
items.summary_cn: 尽管进展迅速，但大多数由2D视觉输入构建的现有视觉语言模型（ VLM ）在处理需要细粒度空间理解和推理的各种3D任务时通常会遇到困难。为了弥合这一差距，我们推出了VLM-IE3D ，这是一个增强3D空间感知的统一框架...
items.comment: 新模型发布，效果先观望，按 token 计费的玩法，用得起吗？

items.title: GraphVid: Interactive Graph-Controllable Video Generation
items.title_cn: GraphVid ：交互式图形可控视频生成
items.summary: Controllable video generation remains challenging due to the difficulty of specifying precise multi-object interactions using text prompts or motion-control inputs that primarily constrain pixel movement. In practice, trajectory-based control often requires users to draw accurate tracks for multiple...
items.summary_cn: 由于难以使用主要限制像素移动的文本提示或运动控制输入来指定精确的多对象交互，因此可控视频生成仍然具有挑战性。在实践中，基于轨迹的控制通常需要用户为多个...
items.comment: 法规来了，短期阵痛难免，长期看是行业走向成熟的必经之路。

items.title: Barzilai-Borwein Fails Superlinear Convergence on an Open Set of Quadratics for Every Dimension $n\geq 4$
items.title_cn: Barzilai-Borwein在每个维度的开放式二次集上失败超线性收敛$ n\ geq 4 $
items.summary: Barzilai--Borwein (BB) method has shown strong practical performance in continuous optimization, yet its convergence dynamics remains poorly understood. In particular, a central unresolved question is whether BB converges superlinearly for almost every strictly convex quadratic problem and initializ...
items.summary_cn: Barzilai-Borwein （ BB ）方法在连续优化中表现出强大的实用性能，但其收敛动力学仍然知之甚少。特别是，一个尚未解决的中心问题是，对于几乎所有严格凸二次问题， BB是否超线性收敛，...
items.comment: 法规来了，短期阵痛难免，长期看是行业走向成熟的必经之路。

items.title: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers
items.title_cn: 人工智能护栏如何阻碍攻击性网络安全研究人员的工作
items.summary: We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.
items.summary_cn: 我们采访了几位网络安全研究人员，他们寻找未知的漏洞并开发工具来利用它们，了解OpenAI和Anthropic的护栏如何影响他们的工作。
items.comment: 新论文发布，先别急着引用，等社区复现和讨论再说。

items.title: Mobileye CEO Amnon Shashua to step aside as company pushes into robotaxis, robotics
items.title_cn: Mobileye首席执行官Amnon Shashua辞职，公司推出机器人出租车和机器人技术
items.summary: Shashua has been invited to take the chairman of the board seat.
items.summary_cn: Shashua已被邀请担任董事会主席。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
items.title_cn: AMD凭借其Helios AI机架式系统取代英伟达
items.summary: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.
items.summary_cn: AMD正在通过新的机架式系统挑战其芯片制造商竞争对手，该系统将于今年晚些时候开始向客户出货。
items.comment: AI 领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。

items.title: Claude Cookbook
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: Show HN: Echo – Fable-level results at 1/3 the cost using open-weight models
items.title_cn: 显示HN ：回声–使用开放权重模型以1/3的成本获得寓言级结果
items.summary: I’ve been building Echo ( https://echo.tracerml.ai/ ), an experiment in making one AI system out of a pool of open-weight models rather than choosing a single model and using it for every task. It started with a simple experiment. I took a group of models, including GLM-5.2, Kimi K2.7 and others, and ran them on the same evaluations. Then I measured what would happen if, for each problem, you somehow knew in advance which models would be useful and how their outputs should be combined. That hypo
items.summary_cn: 我一直在构建Echo （ https://echo.tracerml.ai/ ） ，这是一个从开放权重模型池中构建一个AI系统的实验，而不是选择一个模型并将其用于每项任务。它始于一个简单的实验。我选择了一组模型，包括GLM-5.2、Kimi K2.7等，并对它们进行了相同的评估。然后我测量了如果对于每个问题，你事先知道哪些模型是有用的，以及它们的输出应该如何组合，会发生什么。
items.comment: 又是一个「史上最强」，基准测试刷得飞起，实际应用场景待检验。
